expression.expression: CAST((SUBSTRING( report_run_date, 1, ((CASE WHEN ((INSTR(report_run_date, '_')) = 0) THEN NULL ELSE (INSTR(report_run_date, '_')) END) - 1))) AS string)
CAST(`Type of Request paranthesesOpenInquiryslashChange RequestparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Accession hash paranthesesOpenIf ApplicableparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Collection Date in eData paranthesesOpenOptionalparanthesesClose` AS string)
CAST(`Response or Resolution Details` AS string)
CAST(`Priority paranthesesOpenHighcomma Mediumcomma LowparanthesesClose` AS STRING)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) AS DATE) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) AS DATE) ELSE CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS DATE) END)
CAST(`Collection Date in CRF paranthesesOpenIf AvailableparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS STRING)
CAST(`Inquiry hashslashChange Request hash` AS DOUBLE)
